summary: Iteration 19: Frontend-only testing of SmartFill and Discovery UI/UX improvements. All 9 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: SmartFill tab loads correctly with SmartFill AI header
Meeting Notes paste box is compact (min-h-[60px]) and expands to min-h-[120px] on focus/input
Context Summaries section shows 3 columns on desktop (grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-3)
Each summary field has a refresh button for individual regeneration (generate-environment, generate-outcomes, generate-endState)
Analyze All button works for generating all summaries
Discovery tab shows 2-column layout for questions (grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2)
Section toggles work (On/Off) with confirmation dialog for disabling
Extract Answers button exists and works for analyzing meeting notes
critical_code_review_comments: MeetingNotesAI.jsx correctly implements compact paste box with auto-expansion
Context Summaries uses lg:grid-cols-3 for 3-column desktop layout
Each summary field has individual refresh button with data-testid
AssessmentQuestions.jsx uses compact=true prop for 2-column Discovery layout
Section toggles properly show On/Off state with confirmation dialog
context_for_next_testing_agent: All SmartFill and Discovery UI/UX improvements verified: 1) SmartFill tab loads with Meeting Notes section (Upload + Extract Answers buttons) and Context Summaries section (Analyze All button + 3 columns). 2) Meeting Notes paste box is compact and auto-expands. 3) Context Summaries has 3-column layout with individual refresh buttons. 4) All summary fields are editable textareas. 5) Discovery tab has 2-column compact layout with section toggles (On/Off).

smartfill_tab_loads.implementation: SmartFill AI header with Meeting Notes and Context Summaries sections

meeting_notes_compact_expand.implementation: min-h-[60px] initial, min-h-[120px] on focus/input via isExpanded state
meeting_notes_compact_expand.details: Textarea class changes from min-h-[60px] to min-h-[120px] when text is entered

context_summaries_3_column.details: 3 children: Customer's Current Environment, Customer's Desired Project Outcomes, Customer's Target End State

individual_refresh_buttons.details: Each summary field has RefreshCw icon button for individual regeneration

analyze_all_button.details: Calls handleGenerateAll() to generate all summaries sequentially

editable_summary_fields.implementation: Textarea elements with data-testid: context-environment, context-outcomes, context-endState
editable_summary_fields.details: All fields are editable textareas with onChange handlers

discovery_2_column_layout.details: Found 9 2-column grid layouts in Discovery tab

section_toggles.details: Found 9 section toggles: IPAM, Internal-DNS, External-DNS, DHCP, Services, Microsoft-Management, Asset/Network-Insight, Security, Professional-Services

extract_answers_button.details: Enabled when meeting notes text is present, calls /api/analyze-notes endpoint
